## 🚀 How to Run (for the demo / judges)

```bash
# 1. Clone the profile
git clone https://github.com/netzro/eloho-profile.git ~/.hermes/profiles/eloho

# 2. Set up Telegram
cd ~/.hermes/profiles/eloho
cp .env.example .env
# Edit .env → add your TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN

# 3. Start Hermes
hermes gateway start

# 4. DM Eloho on Telegram
```

That's it. The agent runs natively on Hermes, controlled via Telegram DM.
